faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Howard Beach?
faqs.answer: Howard Beach properties frequently encounter carpenter ants (which can damage wooden structures), pavement ants (common in driveways and foundations), odorous house ants, and occasionally pharaoh ants in multi-unit buildings. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method.
